sub_types.name: One year e-Tourist Visa
sub_types.validity: One year (365 Days) from the date of grant of ETA
sub_types.stay_condition: Maximum stay in India during one Calender Year should not exceed 180 days

sub_types.name: Five years e-Tourist Visa
sub_types.validity: Five years from the date of grant of ETA
sub_types.stay_condition: Maximum stay in India during one Calender Year should not exceed 180 days

visa_type_detail.name: e-Tourist Visa (e-T2 V)
visa_type_detail.validity: 6 month from the date of grant of ETA

sub_types.name: e-Business Visa(e-B1 V)
sub_types.validity: One year (365 days) from the date of grant of ETA
sub_types.stay_condition: Continuous stay during each visit shall not exceed 180 days. If the intension is to stay for more then 180 days, shall get registered with FRRO/FRO concerned within two weeks after the expiry of 180 days.

sub_types.name: e-Business Visa (e-B5 V)
sub_types.validity: Thirty days (30 days) from the date of arrival into India

sub_types.name: e-Business Visa(e-B6 V)
sub_types.validity: One year (365 Days) from the date of grant of ETA

sub_types.name: e-Medical Visa(e-M1 V)
sub_types.validity: Sixty days (60 days) from the date of arrival into India

sub_types.name: e-Medical Visa(e-M3 V)
sub_types.validity: Sixty days (60 days) from the date of arrival into India

sub_types.name: e-Medical Attendent Visa(e-M2 V)
sub_types.validity: Sixty days (60 days) from the date of arrival into India

sub_types.name: e-Medical Attendant Visa(e-M4 V)
sub_types.validity: Sixty days (60 days) from the date of arrival into India

visa_type_detail.name: e-Student Visa(e-S V)
visa_type_detail.validity: One year (365 Days) from the date of grant of ETA

visa_type_detail.name: e-Transit Visa(e-TR V)
visa_type_detail.validity: 30 Days from the date of grant of ETA

visa_type_detail.name: e-Miscellaneous Visa (e-X1 V)
visa_type_detail.validity: 3 month from the date of first entry in India

visa_type_detail.name: e-Family Visa(e-SX V)
visa_type_detail.validity: One year (365 Days) from the date of grant of ETA

data.processing_time: Minimum 4 days in advance of the date of arrival (for e-Tourist and e-Business visa). For e-Medical and e-Medical Attendant, minimum 4 days in advance of the date of arrival with a window of 120 days.

essential_apps.description: Official Aadhaar app for accessing Aadhaar details, downloading e-Aadhaar, and managing biometrics.
Platform for booking COVID-19 vaccination appointments and downloading certificates.
Essential for navigation, public transport, and exploring cities in India.

essential_apps.app_name: UPI Apps (e.g., Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm)
essential_apps.description: Unified Payments Interface apps are crucial for digital payments, money transfers, and bill payments across India.
Official app for booking Indian Railways train tickets.
